path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 32 - Persona (Switch) (gamerip) (2019)\01. Last Surprise.mp3
description: This track is an instant classic. Incredible that it never got boring during the entire playtime of Persona 5! Such a catchy chorus. Love the Japanese jazz fusion vibes. Battle music that makes you want to dance, they knew what they were doing.
title: Last Surprise
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 32: Persona

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 32 - Persona (Switch) (gamerip) (2019)\02. Beneath the Mask.mp3
description: One of the most iconic songs from this soundtrack is very peaceful and ACE did a great job turning it into a total jam. We've also got that reharmonisation when the tune comes back again, the Nile Rodgers guitar, the jazz fusion chords. Lots to enjoy!
title: Beneath the Mask
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 32: Persona

filename: 04. Wake Up, Get Up, Get Out There.mp3
path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 32 - Persona (Switch) (gamerip) (2019)\04. Wake Up, Get Up, Get Out There.mp3
description: This is just a great song. Feels like something Gabrielle would sing in 2002, but with an insane bassline. It's intense, it's catchy. It's also insanely long.
title: Wake Up, Get Up, Get Out There
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 32: Persona

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 32 - Persona (Switch) (gamerip) (2019)\05. Rivers In The Desert.mp3
description: Big bosses in Persona were always a bit of a slog, so much so that I came to not enjoy this track. I can't deny that it's good though. When the strings come in on the second verse, great.
title: Rivers In The Desert
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 32: Persona

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 32 - Persona (Switch) (gamerip) (2019)\06. Our Beginning.mp3
description: Final boss music. I don't think it's that good.
title: Our Beginning
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 32: Persona

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 32 - Persona (Switch) (gamerip) (2019)\07. Reach Out To The Truth.mp3
description: That intro alone makes me dislike the track. It's way to anime for me.
title: Reach Out To The Truth
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 32: Persona

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 32 - Persona (Switch) (gamerip) (2019)\08. I'll Face Myself.mp3
description: I feel neither here nor there about this anime-ass music. I haven't played Persona 4 but if it sounds like this I don't think I'm interested.
title: I'll Face Myself
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 32: Persona

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 32 - Persona (Switch) (gamerip) (2019)\09. Time To Make History.mp3
description: I find it both weird and cheesy. I dunno Persona 5 is just so much better music-wise.
title: Time To Make History
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 32: Persona

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 32 - Persona (Switch) (gamerip) (2019)\10. Mass Destruction.mp3
description: It's a weird rap song. I don't think it sounds cool. Who made this.
title: Mass Destruction
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 32: Persona

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 32 - Persona (Switch) (gamerip) (2019)\11. Battle Hymn of the Soul.mp3
description: Wow this track goes kinda hard. I like the piano & strings over the techno beat. It's also got Aria of the Soul in there as a bonus!
title: Battle Hymn of the Soul
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 32: Persona

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 32 - Persona (Switch) (gamerip) (2019)\12. Aria of the Soul.mp3
description: This is a great remix of the music from the 'Velvet Room' which I think appears in many Persona games. Just like the other Persona 5 remix, they take a classic slow song and make a great fast-paced remix. The last part before the loop? Excellent.
title: Aria of the Soul
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 32: Persona
